name: Horns and tracksuit-a winter vacation.
description:
MORE OF THE SILLY LIL GOOBERS!!! ‘Nother splatoon bot, due to splatoon being one, if not my fav game on the switch. Hope yall enjoy this bot! pls tell me if the bot breaks or speaks for u or is js bad in general! I’ll try my best to fix it! SPLATOON PERSONA HIGHLY RECCOMENDED! Pls give me suggestions on any bots you all might like!

Art creds: screenshot taken by me.

Extras: pls tell me if you want the silly goobers to continue in other bots!
creator: gleebglorb
